style_bible.visual_style: Cinematic sci-fi with warm red and orange hues, high contrast shadows, and realistic textures emphasizing Mars' rugged terrain and futuristic space gear.
style_bible.camera_rules: Use steady and smooth camera movements; start with wider lenses (24mm) for environment establishing shots, then move to tighter lenses (50mm, 85mm) for emotional close-ups; maintain consistent framing to highlight character focus.
style_bible.continuity_rules: Main astronaut character wears a red and white Mars suit with helmet; rocky Mars landscape with a visible rover and base camp; lighting and weather conditions consistent across scenes; no wardrobe or environment changes.

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Introduce the stranded astronaut on Mars and the rescue rover approaching.

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: Wide establishing shot
- lens: 24mm
- camera movement: Slow dolly forward
- subject & action: Astronaut standing near a rocky outcrop, looking toward horizon
- environment details: Red rocky Mars terrain with dust clouds, distant rover visible
- lighting: Harsh sunlight casting long shadows
- cinematic look: Warm tones with high contrast

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: Medium shot
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: Slow pan right following rover movement
- subject & action: Rover slowly approaching astronaut
- environment details: Dust swirling around rover wheels
- lighting: Directional sunlight with subtle fill
- cinematic look: Crisp detail on rover and astronaut suit

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: Close-up
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: Static
- subject & action: Astronaut helmet visor reflecting rover lights
- environment details: Dust particles in air
- lighting: Backlit with soft rim light
- cinematic look: Intense and dramatic

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: Starts with wide dolly, pans to rover, ends with static close-up
scenes.audio_cue: Low ambient Mars wind with distant mechanical rover hum

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Show rising tension as the rover encounters a mechanical failure.

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: Medium close-up
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: Slow handheld shake
- subject & action: Rover control panel sparks briefly
- environment details: Dust clouds thickening
- lighting: Flickering light from sparks
- cinematic look: Gritty and tense

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: Wide shot
- lens: 24mm
- camera movement: Quick tilt down to rover wheels stuck in rocky terrain
- subject & action: Rover wheels spinning but stuck
- environment details: Jagged rocks and loose soil
- lighting: Harsh sunlight with shadows
- cinematic look: High contrast emphasizing struggle

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: Close-up
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: Slow push in
- subject & action: Astronaut’s gloved hand gripping rover door handle tightly
- environment details: Dust particles in air
- lighting: Soft rim light highlighting hand and handle
- cinematic look: Intense focus on action

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: Handheld shake, quick tilt, slow push in
scenes.audio_cue: Mechanical grinding sounds with rising tension music

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Resolve the crisis as the astronaut manually frees the rover and prepares to leave.

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: Medium shot
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: Steady track forward
- subject & action: Astronaut using a tool to pry rocks from rover wheels
- environment details: Rocky terrain with dust settling
- lighting: Warm sunlight with soft shadows
- cinematic look: Hopeful and determined

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: Wide shot
- lens: 24mm
- camera movement: Slow crane up
- subject & action: Rover wheels freeing and starting to move
- environment details: Dust lifting as rover moves
- lighting: Bright sunlight
- cinematic look: Triumphant and cinematic

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: Close-up
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: Static
- subject & action: Astronaut helmet visor reflecting Mars horizon and rover lights driving away
- environment details: Clear sky with faint stars
- lighting: Soft backlight with warm tones
- cinematic look: Calm and resolved

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: Steady track, slow crane, static close-up
scenes.audio_cue: Rising hopeful orchestral music with rover engine starting
